programme.desc: Daniel learns that sometimes it's good to take your time.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Elmo's Happy Little Train

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Pastry

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators: This Rough Magic

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries: An Invincible Summer

programme.title: The Woman in White

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: WWE Raw

programme.title: Briarpatch: Breadknife Weather

programme.title: Modern Family: Double Click
programme.desc: Claire can't seem to find the right time to fire one of her employees, while back at home Phil thinks he caught Luke with a girl in his bed, and no one seems to notice that Alex has moved back home for the summer.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Tale of Three Cities

programme.title: Modern Family: A Stereotypical Day

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out

programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear
programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: The Misery Index: He's Crushing His Man Cave Game
programme.desc: The Tenderloins witness the most embarrassing way to ruin a wedding.

programme.title: The Misery Index: If My Grandmother Was That Hot, I'd Go for Her Too
programme.desc: Murr doesn't want to 'pucker up' and Sal would rather have fire ants on his face than heave this misery. A bidet victim and someone who showed nudes to their boss compete for master of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: So That's Murder Then?
programme.desc: Jameela shows us there are some things you don't want to find in your toilet. Saul shows us how to ruin a wedding. A pants-wetter and a forgetful husband battle for the chance at the grand prize.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect
programme.desc: Joe and Q become 'gentlemen', a little piggy goes to the emergency room, and a man rides the elevator from hell as a clumsy paramedic and accidental sexter battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pixelated Vision
programme.desc: Michael reels in customers with a new fishing tool and shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: One More Chance

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Tale of Two Tails

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Giraffe
programme.desc: Rothschild's giraffe Orla has got the keepers guessing. She is about to give birth to her third calf, but is two weeks overdue. This episode captures the astonishing arrival of the giraffe family's youngest member and its introduction to the herd.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A New Year for Villalobos

programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his ex-girlfriend, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. DiNozzo and McGee travel to the crime scene for the joint murder and kidnapping case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Assassin
programme.desc: When the leader of a war-torn nation's Democracy Movement is exiled to the United States, assassins immediately target her. Logan and Wheeler race to identify and capture the hitmen before they succeed in silencing the woman.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Please Note, We Are No Longer Accepting Letters of Recommendation From Kissinger
programme.desc: Three people are shot and killed at close range, but their two-year-olds were left unharmed. It turns out they knew their killer, who was obsessed with entry into an exclusive pre-school.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Reunion
programme.desc: When the host of a music talk show is bludgeoned to death with a champagne bottle, Logan and Wheeler's investigation into the seamy music world involves Jordie Black, Wheeler's favourite rock star from high school.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even
programme.desc: Intelligence responds to a drug robbery gone wrong and in their investigation it is revealed that the first person Voight ever gave his card to is linked to a double murder. Halstead discovers the real reason his brother came to Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's
programme.desc: The search is on for one of Chicago's most wanted after several dead teenage girls turn up in a Chinatown factory.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Number of Rats
programme.desc: Benson travels to Chicago to help Voight and intelligence with a rape/ murder case that is eerily similar to a case from New York a decade ago. She calls in Fin and Amaro to assist.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge on the Lam
programme.desc: Marge and her new friend, Ruth, channel Thelma and Louise as the two ladies run from Chief Wiggum and Homer after it's revealed that Ruth is driving a stolen car.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Itchy & Scratchy Land
programme.desc: A family trip to Itchy and Scratchy Land proves heavenly until the robots go crazy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grampa vs. Sexual Inadequacy
programme.desc: A tonic saves Homer and Marge's sex life, but breaks the bond between father and son.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart on the Road

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wizard of Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: Homer finally invents something that works and he makes sure that nothing similar exists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Maximum Homerdrive
programme.desc: Homer girds his loins and chucks out his insecurities as he engages Red, a well-known trucker, in a beef-eating contest with high steaks.

programme.desc: Cesar has always believed that kids are more receptive to his training methods and often succeed in getting a dog to behave faster than most adults can.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounds From Hell
programme.desc: Pet adoption is a cause close to Cesar's heart, so he lends his support to rescue dog owners being terrorized by hounds from hell.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Pup-Pup-Hooray!
programme.desc: From constipated canines to nasty dogfights, these pups have seen better days.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: E-I-E-I-Pol
programme.desc: Spring showers bring May flowers and a rather painful situation for one unlucky patient.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Flip 'N Stitch
programme.desc: The first days of autumn bring a new vet to Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: The Alpacalypse
programme.desc: Dr. Pol hits the road to House Farms to handle an emergency calving, where a bone has cracked and fallen into the pelvis of the cow, blocking the calf’s way out.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Alien Earths
programme.desc: New discoveries of alien earths reveal vital clues in finding extraterrestrial life, using the latest science and technology, experts reveal the strange landscapes and oceans of these distant worlds.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Finding Alien Moons
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts in their search for the first alien moon outside our solar system, which could be Earth-like worlds with the potential for life. So far, they haven't found any, but twenty-first century methods might change everything.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Secret Enemies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the hidden cosmic threats facing our planet, and with the help of the latest science and cutting-edge technology, astronomers investigate what might happen when the universe strikes back.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Earth
programme.desc: The Earth was formed by a series of cosmic cataclysms including the most powerful blast in the Universe. Look at whether the same chain of events could have created other earths inhabited by creatures like us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How the Universe Built Your Car
programme.desc: Beneath the hood of your car lies the history of the Universe. The iron in your chassis, the gold in your stereo and the copper in your electronics all owe their existence to violent cosmic events that took place billions of years ago.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Megastorms
programme.desc: In our quest to discover if we are alone in the universe, we shouldn't just look for worlds, we should look for weather. Find chaotic weather and maybe we will find alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Big Bang
programme.desc: As experiments go, the Large Hadron Collider at Cern is one of the biggest. Its circular tunnel is 17 miles long, and the most expensive at a cost of six billion dollars. Presenter Brian Cox tackles the question: what exactly is it going to tell us?

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the secrets hidden in our moon.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Mercury
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets, and even though it's the smallest planet in our solar system, it has a dangerous secret a dangerous secret that might one day threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: The Big House: Auburn
programme.desc: The State Penitentiary in Auburn, New York is a monument to criminal rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.desc: Informational programming.

programme.desc: Informational programming.

programme.desc: Informational programming.

programme.desc: Informational programming.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Nightwatch: The End Is Just the Beginning
programme.desc: From gunshot victims to seizures to a moped rider playing Pokémon Go, EMT's see everything on one more busy night before they can celebrate the end of the summer.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling with Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Crippling Desire
programme.desc: A home health care nurse falls in love with her married, wheelchair-bound patient. Once the secret gets out, someone has to die.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood Red Reunion
programme.desc: After a long-lost daughter reunites with her family, their peaceful Florida neighborhood is devastated by scandal, betrayal, and a double-murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Crippling Desire
programme.desc: A home health care nurse falls in love with her married, wheelchair-bound patient. Once the secret gets out, someone has to die.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood Red Reunion
programme.desc: After a long-lost daughter reunites with her family, their peaceful Florida neighborhood is devastated by scandal, betrayal, and a double-murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: Love Kills: It Was All a Big Fantasy
programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Love Kills: Us Against the World
programme.desc: Fate in the form of a framed picture brings Lori and Mike together. Mike's been in prison and wants to start over. When he meets Lori, he wants to take care of her. But when he can't get a job, he goes to the dark side again, taking Lori with him.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends to Foes
programme.desc: It's easy to keep friends and enemies close when they're one and the same. These Deadly Women turn from 'Friends to Foes.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Broken Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women brutally turned on family and in-laws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Keep It In the Family
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women strike they keep it 'In The Family'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: In the Family
programme.desc: Some killers don't go far to find their victims. Driven by revenge, greed and family 'honor,' these women turned on their own. When these Deadly Women struck, they kept it 'In the Family.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Vengeance
programme.desc: Revenge is one of the oldest motives for murder. But these cases are much more than an 'eye for an eye'. For some women, the insatiable quest for retribution grows wildly out of proportion to the point where they methodically seek Lethal Vengence.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Tangle
programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: True Nightmares: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A simple dispute between neighbors escalates into a serious conflict that requires police intervention; A man's uneventful life is turned upside down when his wife goes missing; A tennis star appears to be an unbeatable foe to all of her competitors.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. As days go by with no sign of the baby or demands for ransom, sergeants Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she's been sold on the black market or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn't come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing. As the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso
programme.desc: Lawlessness runs rampant in a notorious Texas outpost and it's up to legendary lawman Dallas Stoudenmire to tame the town known as 'Hell' Paso.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Seasonal Squeeze
programme.desc: The three teams continue their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team wrestles giant glulam beams into place and the situation turns disastrous after a poorly cut beam pushes out an entire wall.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Emergency Supply Run
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team comes dangerously close to catastrophe as they install a 1,000 pound ridge beam. At Mark Sam's build, the team runs out of critical supplies.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Roof Overhead
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, rain has put everything on hold and the crew struggles to keep things dry. At Mark Sam's build on Chichagof Island, tensions run high on Rich's last day making the team uneasy.

programme.title: Building Alaska: End Game
programme.desc: At Point MacKenzie, Dave Poppert fights the cold and snow to finish his home in time for Thanksgiving dinner. Bruce Chambers lucks out when a friend comes to help put the finishing touches his Latouche Island cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ballard
programme.desc: An early 1900s cabin that's intimately tied to Maine's history and legacy puts Chase and the team to the test as they try to re-create its original look and feel.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rock Pond Living Space
programme.desc: A dirt pile of a backyard with an old shed and dying plants is transformed into an entertainer's dream. An unused space quickly becomes everyone's hangout when a cascading rock pond takes center stage.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Revival
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1920s Spanish Eclectic
programme.desc: A couple find a cute 1920s Spanish eclectic home in which they want to update the kitchen, add an ensuite bathroom and dressing room to the master, and plant a drought-tolerant garden, all staying in Spanish style.

programme.title: Restored: 1947 Postmodern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife. However, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Ballad of Salty and Sweet
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown examines ways to super-charge desserts with salt.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Proof Is in the Bread Pudding
programme.desc: Alton Brown uses a secret formula in an attempt to devise definitive bread pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Bird in the Pie Is Worth Two in the Bush
programme.desc: Alton Brown looks at ways to resurrect classic foods like chicken potpie.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust

programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath

programme.title: Moonshiners: Art of the 'Shine: Underground Still
programme.desc: Presenting the 'Art of Shine' with Mark, Digger and Tim. Mark and Jeff call in legendary moonshiner Jim Tom to help fix their busted still. Then, it's man vs beast when Mark hunts down a giant wild hog that's been stalking their site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Art of the 'Shine: Tennessee Copper Pot Still
programme.desc: Featuring the 'Art of Shine' with Mark, Digger and Tim. Mark and Jeff struggle to set up their remote still site. Tensions run high in the Kentucky distillery with Tim and his partner Steve, and a new moonshiner appears in Mississippi.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Art of the 'Shine: 500 Gallon Still

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Hemp Shine

programme.desc: Mark and Digger visit an old-time shiner in Georgia and reclaim a valuable piece of Popcorn Sutton history. Tim and Tickle devise a plan to sell their new shine. Mike discovers a rival's liquor on his turf. Distillers compete to make the best rum.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shiners on Shine: Legend of Popcorn Sutton
programme.desc: When Mark and Digger find a decade-old jar of Popcorn Sutton's shine, they vow to recreate their mentor's infamous last run. With help from old-timer JB Rader, they rebuild Popcorn's pot still and recount the antics of Appalachia's most legendary outlaw.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: X Marks the Spot

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let It Go

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Color Me Lonely
programme.desc: Kris goes overboard trying to make sure Bruce isn’t getting lonely now that they are separated. Meanwhile, Scott and Kourtney inherit a painting that might be worth millions.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Doggy Blu's

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast on the Run
programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Make It Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making things easy with four great recipes. First, there's easy queso to go with pork carnitas that have a shortened cooking time thanks to a multicooker. A humble sheet of foil is the secret to awesome brown sugar ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faster Pasta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making pasta dishes in no time at all. She whips up steakhouse pasta with grilled steak, and her lemon pasta pronto is scattered with glorious flecks of pink and green.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dorm Room Dining
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing some great ideas for simple, minimal-prep dorm room food made with basic tools, such as waffle maker pizzas, paninis and quesadillas. Next, she shows how to use a zipper bag to make a great Caesar salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: There's a burning on the prairie, but in Ree Drummond's kitchen, everything is sweet, stocked up and frozen. She's making mini chocolate-pecan-caramel cheesecakes that are elegant enough for impromptu entertaining and simple ice cream truffles two ways.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Ree and Paige reminisce about an incredible trip to New York over an afternoon tea party for two! On the menu are divine Ham and Leek Mini Quiches, Garden Spread Finger Sandwiches, Lemon Raspberry Tarts and Mini Doughnut Muffins.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple D Takes On Triple G ... Again!
programme.desc: Creating the ultimate diner dish should be easy for Triple D chefs, but a strict weight limit on ingredients makes this challenge heavy duty. Then, who has time to figure out what Guy's favorite dish is when you only get a few minutes to shop.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Burgers 2
programme.desc: Four burger masters are ready to see how they stack up against each other in a contest worth up to $20,000. First, the chefs must shop for the ingredients for an over-the-top burger using an underwhelming, tiny bag.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bacon to the Max

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Zanzibar Leopard
programme.desc: Forrest sets out on a history-making expedition in Zanzibar, revealing species that have never before been filmed. He captures evidence that leads to an unforgettable conclusion on the Zanzibar Leopard, an animal that was declared extinct 25 years ago.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: White Wolf of Newfoundland
programme.desc: Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of the White Wolf, a predator that was declared extinct in 1930. They meet with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf and uncover evidence that suggests the species could be alive.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Sharks in the Shadows
programme.desc: Coyote and his team travel to Australia to find the wobbegong shark. As night falls, they search the treacherous tidepools for this sly nocturnal predator and ponder whether these fearsome fish are a threat to humans.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Deadly Tide Pools
programme.desc: Coyote explores the coastline of Australia in hopes of discovering the most toxic aquatic creatures. As he battles the jagged rocks and crashing waves, he encounters a stonefish lurking beneath the mysterious tide pool water.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Night of the River Monsters
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson braves the winding rivers of Maleny, Australia, in search of a real river monster: the elusive and massive long-finned eel. Coyote also encounters a smiling Saw Shelled Turtle and gets a painful, bloody kiss from a Carpet Python.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Aliens of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson explores some of Australia's alien-looking lizard species and learns about their bizarre features - evolutionary adaptations to the harsh outback. Then, the team is hot on the trail of the elusive spike-covered Thorny devil.

programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Number of Rats

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Tidings We Bring

programme.desc: A brutal murder uncovers one couple’s shocking history of domestic abuse and raises surprising questions about the identity of the aggressor.

programme.desc: Phoebe the Elephant goes into labor, and Aurora the Polar Bear gets a root canal.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Polar Bear Express
programme.desc: A 600-pound manatee named Agua is released back into the wild after years at the zoo.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Mow, Mow, Mow Your Goat
programme.desc: Before the Pols can go work on their lake house, Dr. Pol must treat an array of clients.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Dr. Franken-Pol
programme.desc: Neck bites and thunderous growls rattle cages at Pol Veterinary as they feel the horror of the Halloween season.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: One Great Dane
programme.desc: It’s an emotional time for the Pols as they say farewell to their beloved Great Dane, Frija.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Oh, Pol-y Night
programme.desc: It is the holiday season in Michigan and Dr. Pol and his team make their patient list, check it twice, and treat those who are naughty, spotty, snotty, and nice.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the First Americans
programme.desc: The earliest Americans built giant pyramids and carved massive, alien-looking carvings into the deserts of Peru millennia ago. Using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts reveal the long-lost secrets of these mysterious and distant civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Oracles
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the darkest secrets of the mysterious oracles at Delphi, ancient Greece's strange prophets of the underworld. Using hi-tech archaeology, experts could finally explain how these purportedly psychic beings became so powerful.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
Forbidden History: Curse of the Oracles
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the darkest secrets of the mysterious oracles at Delphi, ancient Greece's strange prophets of the underworld. Using hi-tech archaeology, experts could finally explain how these purportedly psychic beings became so powerful.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Alaska Mega Machines: Behemoths of the Bush
programme.desc: Only in Alaska can you find an airport made from nothing but water and ice. A mega Alaskan fish factory churns out three million pounds of seafood a day. Hardy vehicles brave the arctic to travel across the tundra.

programme.title: Alaska Mega Machines: Warriors in the Last Frontier
programme.desc: A barge like you've never seen carries an entire train along Alaska's high seas. A flying ambulance saves lives at 14,000 feet above Alaska's wilderness. And next to a field of moose, 16 missiles stand by to prevent a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Alaska Mega Machines: Bering Sea Giants
programme.desc: Alaska's Coast Guard fights the most dangerous waters in the state to maintain buoys standing three stories tall. Plus, explosive machinery yields big rewards 800 feet below Alaska's surface.

programme.title: Alaska Mega Machines: Beasts of the Arctic
programme.desc: A rugged ship built to withstand tsunami size waves travels on a highway unlike any other in North America. A fleet of machines combats a massive flood in the Arctic Circle. And the biggest, most powerful wind turbines in Alaska.

programme.title: Alaska Mega Machines: Gargantuan off the Grid
programme.desc: On the remote island of Sitka, Alaskan engineers construct a gargantuan dam to power the entire town. Ride shotgun on a dangerous mission on the world's largest helicopters. And, Alaska's biggest boat lift hauls a 400-ton fishing ship in high winds.

programme.title: Alaska Mega Machines: The Yeti Strikes Back
programme.desc: The Yeti, a machine with 588 sharp teeth, helps keep the coldest airport in America running. Mighty tugboats chew through ice chunks in the busiest port in Alaska. And soldiers become Arctic Warriors in the coldest army post in the country.

programme.title: Monster Ships: King in the North
programme.desc: The Helgafell is one of the largest vessels on the icy waters of the North Atlantic, and its crew uses the latest engineering and cutting-edge technology to cross a deadly ocean and deliver its goods before time runs out.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime of Passion: The Pamela Smart Story
programme.desc: Pamela Smart seduced her 15-year-old lover into killing her husband.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Katrina
programme.desc: On the tenth anniversary of Hurricane Katrina, everyone in New Orleans and on the Nightwatch recall their experiences with the storm, and reflect upon the significance it still holds in their lives.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A woman is found dead and her boyfriend tries to help police catch the killer.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Up and coming lawyer Michael Fletcher can barely keep it together as he calls police to his suburban Detroit home. Upon arrival, officers find Fletcher's wife, Leann, dead from an apparent accidental self-inflicted gunshot wound.

programme.title: Casanova Killers: Lethal Lovers
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach two well respected doctors, Carolyn and Ken Stahl, are found shot to death on the side of a highway. As police unravel this baffling case they find the power couple had a less than perfect marriage.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Laci Peterson
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a fresh look at the death of Laci Peterson, whose husband Scott was convicted of her murder in 2004 and is currently on death row.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: End of Watch
programme.desc: The town of Cleveland, OK experiences overwhelming heartbreak when its esteemed Sheriff is mysteriously gunned down in the night. As the community wrestles with its safety, law enforcement is determined to find justice for their fellow officer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who's Missing Now
programme.desc: When beloved young waitress Zilpha Lowery goes missing, foul play is immediately suspected. Rumors of her fate drift through town and tie her to another mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: When the Gun Went Off
programme.desc: When Kathy Middleton died of a gunshot in her own home, police had three options: it was an accident, suicide, or her husband, Ken, killed her. After deciding on option three, Ken's now doing life but his family insists he was wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: When the Gun Went Off

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
