programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo
programme.desc: Jack tries to deliver mail on a pogo stick, Markiplier takes on a boss battle in Cuphead, Dan swallows up scenery in Donut County, and Muselk attempts a new Fortnite challenge.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Tiny Dancer
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Who Let the Frogs Out?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Just Get Over It
programme.desc: DanTDM and friends try not to rage quit while playing one of the hardest games in the world.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Let's Take a Snakacation
programme.desc: Crank goes snake hunting in Donut County, DanTDM explores Vacation Simulator's oceans, Jack tries Enter the Gungeon and CupQuake battles in Fortnite.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Rise Above It All
Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!
programme.desc: Blading superstar Valt Aoi visits Dante for a friendly battle before opening the Bey Carnival; once the tournament begins, the Victories will need to get the hang of the Hyper Stadium if they hope to win.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Living on the Cutting Edge!
programme.desc: Objects are being cut into pieces all over Melemele Island, and the Ultra Guardians set out to investigate!

programme.desc: A man finds release through fistfights that evolve into a philosophical movement.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Freeheld

programme.title: Movie: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: Movie: Unknown

programme.title: Movie: Soldier

programme.title: Movie: Brothers

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home Roxy Carmichael

programme.title: Movie: Red Riding Hood

programme.title: Movie: The Mule
programme.desc: An old man who's broke and estranged from his family becomes a drug mule for a Mexican cartel in an attempt to make ends meet, but when his past mistakes start to weigh on his heart he tries to make things right before the DEA catches up with him.

programme.title: Movie: American Woman
programme.desc: After her daughter disappears a woman raises her young grandson.

programme.title: Movie: The Impossible
programme.desc: A family finds themselves among thousands of victims and strangers in a natural catastrophe.

programme.title: Movie: District 9

programme.title: Movie: Real Steel

programme.title: Movie: 12 Monkeys

programme.title: Desus & Mero: WHOPPING GOOD TIME

programme.title: Funny Women of a Certain Age
programme.desc: Fran Drescher leads a cast of mature women of stand-up in a night of uninhibited comedy.

programme.title: Movie: Good Luck Chuck

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect World

programme.title: Movie: The Prince and Me

programme.title: Movie: Just Go With It

programme.desc: Ross is determined to make Rachel see they should be together. An old video from Monica’s prom surfaces and Rachel sees how much Ross has always loved her. Joey buys Chandler a gold bracelet as a thank you gift.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Weekend With Birdie
programme.desc: Mike brings home a stray puppy for the weekend but Molly has difficulty warming up to it.

programme.title: Mom: Xanax and a Baby Duck
programme.desc: An overprotective Christy keeps a constant eye on her 12-year-old son, after discovering he has been using drugs and alcohol and Bonnie finds herself in the strange position of being the calm and rational one.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: The twins opt out of the family Halloween costume for fear it will hurt their social status in middle school. Dre and Bow take it upon themselves to protect them from bullies by putting together the best haunted house and invite the whole seventh grade.

programme.title: Riverdale: Chapter Seventy-Two: To Die For
programme.desc: Alice begins shooting a documentary on Riverdale and the latest mystery involving on of its own. Betty, Archie and Veronica fall deeper into a web of lies as the investigation gets underway.

programme.title: Nancy Drew: The Terror of Horseshoe Bay
programme.desc: With time running out before Carson's evidentiary hearing, Nancy turns to supernatural sources in a last-ditch effort to find clues to exonerate her father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Sister
programme.desc: Rachel tries to help her sister Jill find her independence, but she flirts with disaster.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bizarro Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry is disturbed by his date's 'man hands.' Kramer starts working in an office. George gains access to an exclusive club for models by using a photograph of his 'dead fiancée.' Elaine's new friends are exact opposites of Jerry, George and Kramer.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly Can't Lie
programme.desc: When Mike and Molly meet with the priest at Peggy's church, Molly's forthright nature ends up costing them their wedding chapel.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: O Captain! My Captain!
programme.desc: Beverly substitutes for Barry's chemistry class in hopes of inspiring the students in the same way as Mr. Keating from 'Dead Poets Society,' much to Barry’s embarrassment.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Age of Darkness
programme.desc: Beverly is crushed when, despite her best efforts, she cannot console Erica after she is dumped by her boyfriend. Murray steps in to help his daughter. Meanwhile, Barry is obsessed with a new arcade game and asks Pops for money to play.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Sophie Doll
programme.desc: When the girls take a bartending class in order to add cocktails to their dessert bar menu, Caroline must think quickly when she has to take the class exam solo after Max gets chicken pox. Also, Sophie creates a creepy lookalike video monitor doll.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Just the Three of Us
programme.desc: Melanie is jealous of the attention Derwin gives Janay as he attends an appointment with her. Kelly wants her and Jason to tell their daughter about their separation.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Circle of Life
programme.desc: When Mike brings home a dead duck he shot for dinner, Kristin is horrified that he would expose young Boyd to the violence of death.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Shimmel vs. James
programme.desc: Woman suspects her fiancé is cheating with her former best friend.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Not So Blushing Bride/ It's Not Just a Game
programme.desc: Woman claims jealous bridesmaid damaged her wedding dress; woman blames nanny for son's large video game bill.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Not My Sister's Mover
programme.desc: Sisters over a broken lease.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Valentin vs. Jordan
programme.desc: After having a one-night-stand, this Chicago woman brings her sex partner to court to prove he is the biological father of her four-month-old son.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Getting the Vote Out/ Hidden Damage
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues for cost of new computer; man sues ex-roommate for property damage.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Stale Sex
programme.desc: Bianca wants to get the record straight with a girl named Clara. Bianca suspects that Clara has been cheating her boyfriend of three years, DJ!

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff met the Defendant in elementary school and claims years later when they reconnected, he hit on her despite the fact that he had a girlfriend. She is suing for the cost of Disneyland tickets.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Refusing A Love Bribe', 'Getting Dirty' and 'Stop Your Dog.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Paintball Deposit/ Damaged Tools
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues for deposit to group event; plaintiff sues over damaged equipment.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Best friends are in court over $4,000 in unpaid rent. Then, a plaintiff is suing after being struck by the defendant's vehicle; the defendant says he's using this court appearance as a money grab.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Watch Porn With Our Daughters and Molest Them?
programme.desc: On this episode, Monique confronts her ex, Harry, who her children claim showed them pornography. Now she fears her children have been molested by Harry and she wants him to finally admit it.

programme.title: Maury: I've Been Tested For Five Babies ... They Can't All Be Mine!
programme.desc: Anthony was DNA tested for four kids, three of which where his; now he’s denying Cierra’s baby. Jena was with several men after breaking up with Matthew, but says he’s the father of her baby. Allie’s back because her man’s ex is back in the picture.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Eye Spy a Cheater
programme.desc: Josh regrets making a promise to his long distance girlfriend Iyana. He proposed to her but is having second thoughts about marriage claiming she’s constantly trying to keep track of his every move.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Cedar Rapids
programme.desc: A man leaves his sleepy town for the first time in 34 years to represent his insurance company at a convention.

programme.title: Movie: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: After an encounter with a spiritual guru, a literary agent finds an odd tree in his yard that loses a leaf each time the agent speaks.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Ever Forgive Me?
programme.desc: After her style of writing falls out of favour, a biographer finds herself broke and out of work. She beings forging letters by famous people and selling them, but when potential buyers begin to get suspicious she turns to stealing actual letters.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Months
programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Grosse Pointe Blank
programme.desc: A hitman returns home to do a little business and attend his high school reunion.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: In a World ...
programme.desc: A woman finds herself competing against her own father in the movie trailer voice-over profession.

programme.title: Movie: Raising Arizona
programme.desc: An eccentric, childless couple decide to kidnap one baby from a set of quintuplets.

programme.title: Movie: Bye Bye Love
programme.desc: Three divorced fathers struggle to bond with their children on weekends.

programme.title: Movie: Cake
programme.desc: A woman becomes fascinated by the suicide of a woman in her chronic pain support group.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Witless Protection
programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to rescue a girl who he thought was being kidnapped. He learns that the kidnappers are FBI agents who are actually trying to kill the girl.

programme.title: Movie: The Ringer
programme.desc: In order to slide out from beneath a mound of debt, a nice young man decides to rig the Special Olympics by posing as a contestant.
